title: Document Solution Architecture for Salesforce Certification
description:
Salesforce certification requires documentation showing the solution architecture including detailed information flow, authentication mechanisms, encryption on data transfer, and data touchpoints.

## Requirements

- Share detailed information flow diagrams
- Document authentication and encryption mechanisms for data in transit
- Identify all data touchpoints between DataTools Pro and Salesforce
- Provide basic usage instructions to orient Salesforce reviewers

## Deliverable

Updated Salesforce App Store Listing documentation on Confluence with architecture details.
acceptance_criteria: Solution architecture documentation covers information flow between DataTools Pro and Salesforce
Authentication mechanisms are documented with diagrams
Encryption methods for data in transit are specified
All data touchpoints are identified and mapped
Basic usage instructions are included for Salesforce reviewer orientation
implementation_notes: Documentation-only task for Salesforce AppExchange certification. Covers the overall solution architecture diagram and data flow documentation.
